creator: freebsd@justmail.de
text:
Created attachment 202494
poudriere build log

Rust 1.33 fails to build on real armv7 (wandboard-quad running 12.0 RELEASE) with this message:

[...]
(01:00:55)    Compiling syntax_ext v0.0.0 (/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/src/libsyntax_ext)
(01:25:09) Traceback (most recent call last):
(01:25:09)   File "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/x.py", line 11, in <module>
(01:25:09)     bootstrap.main()
(01:25:09)   File "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 851, in main
(01:25:09)     bootstrap(help_triggered)
(01:25:09)   File "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 837, in bootstrap
(01:25:09)     run(args, env=env, verbose=build.verbose)
(01:25:09)   File "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/src/bootstrap/bootstrap.py", line 141, in run
(01:25:09)     raise RuntimeError(err)
(01:25:09) RuntimeError: failed to run: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.33.0-src/build/bootstrap/debug/bootstrap build --verbose --config ./config.toml --jobs 4
(01:25:09) *** Error code 1
(01:25:09)
(01:25:09) Stop.
(01:25:09) make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/rust
(01:25:11) =>> Cleaning up wrkdir
(01:25:12) ===>  Cleaning for rust-1.33.0
(01:27:59) build of lang/rust | rust-1.33.0 ended at Fri Mar  1 15:00:50 UTC 2019
(01:27:59) build time: 01:27:59
(01:27:59) !!! build failure encountered !!!

Poudriere log attached.
